# Zynix AI

> Zynix AI is a healthcare intelligence platform that unifies clinical, claims, and operational data to power autonomous AI agents for value-based care organizations — ACOs, health systems, health plans, FQHCs, independent practices, and ASCs. The platform closes care gaps, surfaces rising-risk patients, automates prior authorization and eligibility, improves HCC risk adjustment, and reduces readmissions.

Zynix AI (legal entity Zynix Inc, dba Zyncare for patient SMS) is headquartered in Trinity, Florida. Founded in 2023 by Jayadeva (Jay) Chowdappa, M.D. — a practicing physician who founded six ACOs generating $300M+ in MSSP savings before Zynix. The platform serves 1M+ value-based care patients across 30+ U.S. states and 16+ organizations. HIPAA-compliant, SOC 2 Type II certified, HITRUST in progress. Deployable via Cloud, Private Cloud, On-Premises, or Hybrid.

## Platform

- [Platform Overview](https://www.zynix.ai/platform): Four-layer unified intelligence platform for value-based care
- [Data Platform](https://www.zynix.ai/products-data-platform): Real-time EHR, claims, ADT, labs, and SDoH ingestion with 97%+ patient matching
- [Analytics](https://www.zynix.ai/products-analytics): Risk stratification, HCC coding, HEDIS/Stars tracking, and financial modeling
- [AI Agents Hub](https://www.zynix.ai/agents): Twelve specialized autonomous agents for care, ops, and revenue
- [ZynScribe](https://www.zynix.ai/zynscribe): Ambient AI clinical documentation — 70% reduction in physician documentation time
- [Care Plans](https://www.zynix.ai/care-plans): Deployable TCM, CCM, AWV, HCC, and HEDIS care plan templates executed by AI agents
- [ZynixLLM](https://www.zynix.ai/company-zynixllm): Healthcare-native language model with lower hallucination rates
- [Security & Compliance](https://www.zynix.ai/security): HIPAA, SOC 2 Type II, HITRUST, and AWS GovCloud

## AI Agents

- [ZynAfterHours](https://www.zynix.ai/products-ai-agents-zynafterhours): 24/7 AI voice triage in 15+ languages, 97.3% clinical accuracy, 20-30% ER diversion
- [ZynSchedule](https://www.zynix.ai/products-ai-agents-zynschedule): AI scheduling automation with 40% no-show reduction
- [Post-Discharge Follow-Up](https://www.zynix.ai/products-ai-agents-post-discharge): Automated TCM outreach achieving 85%+ contact rates
- [Medication Reconciliation](https://www.zynix.ai/products-ai-agents-med-rec): Discharge and transition-of-care medication review
- [ZynReminder](https://www.zynix.ai/products-ai-agents-zynreminder): Personalized multi-channel appointment reminders
- [ZynFax](https://www.zynix.ai/products-ai-agents-zynfax): Intelligent fax classification, extraction, and routing
- [ZynAuth](https://www.zynix.ai/products-ai-agents-zynauth): AI prior authorization with 60% turnaround reduction

## Who We Serve

- [ACOs & MSOs](https://www.zynix.ai/audience-segments/acos-msos): MSSP, ACO REACH, and commercial value-based care organizations
- [Health Systems](https://www.zynix.ai/audience-segments/health-systems): Multi-facility networks reducing readmissions and unifying engagement
- [Health Plans](https://www.zynix.ai/audience-segments/health-plans): Medicare Advantage Stars, HEDIS gap closure, and member engagement
- [FQHCs](https://www.zynix.ai/audience-segments/fqhcs): Multilingual outreach, UDS quality reporting, and preventive screening
- [Independent & Group Practices](https://www.zynix.ai/audience-segments/independent-group-practices): After-hours coverage, documentation, and quality tracking
- [Ambulatory Surgery Centers](https://www.zynix.ai/audience-segments/ascs): Prior auth automation and post-operative follow-up

## Use Cases

- [Post-Discharge Follow-Up (TCM)](https://www.zynix.ai/use-cases/post-discharge-follow-up): 85%+ contact rates, 25% readmission reduction
- [HCC Gap Closure](https://www.zynix.ai/use-cases/hcc-gap-closure-health-system-aco): Continuous HCC recapture and RAF optimization
- [After-Hours Triage](https://www.zynix.ai/use-cases/after-hours-triage-multi-site): 24/7 AI voice triage across multi-site networks
- [Prior Authorization](https://www.zynix.ai/use-cases/prior-auth-high-volume-specialty): High-volume specialty auth automation
- [Preventive Screening](https://www.zynix.ai/use-cases/preventive-screening-gap-fqhc): HEDIS gap closure for underserved populations
- [Readmission Prevention](https://www.zynix.ai/use-cases/post-discharge-tcm-readmission): Post-discharge TCM bundle
- [AWV Scheduling](https://www.zynix.ai/use-cases/awv-scheduling-engagement-aco): Annual Wellness Visit outreach for Medicare
- [Chronic Care Management](https://www.zynix.ai/use-cases/chronic-care-management-fqhc): CCM workflow automation
- [Patient Re-Engagement](https://www.zynix.ai/use-cases/patient-reengagement-pns-health-plan): Patients Not Seen outreach
- [SDoH Screening](https://www.zynix.ai/use-cases/sdoh-screening-care-navigation): Social determinants screening and navigation
- [Ambient Documentation](https://www.zynix.ai/use-cases/physician-documentation-ambient-ai): ZynScribe physician documentation
- [HCC RAF Optimization](https://www.zynix.ai/use-cases/hcc-gap-raf-optimization): Continuous RAF accuracy
- [After-Hours ED Diversion](https://www.zynix.ai/use-cases/after-hours-ed-diversion): Avoidable ER visit reduction

## Case Studies

- [Palm Beach ACO](https://www.zynix.ai/case-studies-pbaco): Flagship 600K+ VBC lives, $936M+ cumulative MSSP savings
- [West Florida ACO](https://www.zynix.ai/case-studies-west-florida-aco): Value-based care transformation
- [Space Coast ACO](https://www.zynix.ai/case-studies-space-coast-aco): Care coordination at scale
- [Central Florida ACO](https://www.zynix.ai/case-studies-central-florida-aco): Shared savings generation
- [AMISTAD Community Health Center](https://www.zynix.ai/case-studies-amistad): FQHC quality and UDS reporting
- [eternalHealth](https://www.zynix.ai/case-studies-eternal-health): Medicare Advantage plan
